response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and other languages, but lacks the core requirements for this role: substantial recent C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and any Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain experience. The only C/C++ exposure was a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, which is over a decade old and insufficient for a 5-10 year C++ requirement. No financial services background appears anywhere in the resume.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering background with 10+ years experience
Demonstrated TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby
concerns: Only ~7 months of C/C++ experience, dated to 2014-2015
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience
